cases.description: Generate a formal refund request email.

output.subject: Request for Order Refund — Order #12345
output.body:
Dear Customer Support,

I am writing to request a refund for Order #12345 placed on June 1, 2026. The item arrived damaged and does not match the product description on your website.

Could you please process a full refund at your earliest convenience? I am happy to return the item if required.

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,
Alex
